title: DMO DG Set For Closing Gong on Thursday
description: * *PHYSICAL CLOSING GONG CEREMONY AT THE NGX TRADING FLOOR* NGX is scheduled to host Patience Oniha, the DG of DMO to a physical Closing Gong Ceremony on Thursday, 28th July 2022. Greetings! We are pl
html:
*

*PHYSICAL CLOSING GONG CEREMONY AT THE NGX TRADING FLOOR*

NGX is scheduled to host Patience Oniha, the DG of DMO to a physical Closing Gong Ceremony on Thursday, 28th July 2022.

Greetings!

We are pleased to invite you to a *_physical Closing Gong Ceremony with Patience Oniha, the DG of DMO_*

Date: *_Thursday, 28 July 2022_*
Time: *_1:45pm_*

*The Doyen Alhaji R. O. Yussuff invites all City Gentlemen to support him physically on that day*

Thank you

*ASHON Secretariat*8ì
